ads.title: trafficMASTER Playroom Foam Tiles - New

Each pack covers 16 sq ft. Great for cushioning in playroom areas. Suitable for ages 3 and up. Brand new, still sealed in original packaging.

ads.author: Jon Sutcliffe
ads.title: Space Mission Pinball - 4 Player
ads.description: 1976 Williams Space Mission. This is the 4-player version of Space Odyssey. Does power-up but is non working. Play field lights, score reel runs. Back glass and play field are in great condition, look at pictures, ask for more. Cabinet is decent. Back of box is ugly, see pictures. Legs are ugly. Includes new rubbers kit. Prefer local pickup so you can check out condition but I will ship if you make all shipper arrangements. Pinside Info: Estimated value $1110 - $1290 https://pinside.com/pinball/machine/space-mission

ads.author: Jacob Barker
ads.title: Sony Trinitron 32 in CRT – If You Know You Know – Retro Gaming Beast
ads.description: If you know you know 32” Sony Trinitron CRT one of the BEST TVs ever made for retro gaming. This is the real deal not a cheap CRT. True zero input lag, buttery smooth motion, and the exact look these games were meant to have. Perfect for GameCube Smash Melee Mario Kart Double Dash N64 GoldenEye Mario Party PS2 classics OG Xbox VHS and DVD nostalgia setups These TVs are getting harder and harder to find especially in this size and condition Built like a tank incredible picture quality and that classic Trinitron color pop Includes Front AV inputs ready to plug and play Great for a retro gaming setup or basement arcade vibe Fair warning it’s heavy bring help Serious buyers only this is a collector piece

ads.author: Robert Kiedinger
ads.title: New Lady Luck Pinball Machine Backglass
ads.description: New backglass for a Lucky Lady pinball machine. Dimensions- 24.75"H x 26."W. Would be a replacement for a backglass except that the glasscutter mismeasured and it's 1/8" too tall. So it's a great work of art and conversation piece as is.

ads.author: Robert Kiedinger
ads.title: Pinball Scoring LEDS and Interconnect Board
ads.description: There is 1 seven-digit display, 1 display for credits and random number, and the interconnect board for the displays. They are original from a Williams system 7 machine, functioning 100%, no frizzing or missing numbers. $20 each. or $50 for all 3. Will ship for cost.

ads.author: Robert Stotts
ads.title: Classic Shinobi Full Size Arcade Game
ads.description: This is a full size original Shinobi arcade game. Fully functional and working. It has the original PCB motherboard and I have installed an eprom conversion kit to prevent it from not playing anymore after a certain amount of plays, but I also still have the original EPROMs in case you want to convert it back. I also have the original PCB motherboards for Aliens and Robocop if you are interested. in that as well.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Police Trainer, Upright Arcade, P&P Marketing 1996
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Police Trainer (P&P Marketing, 1996) Price: $375 (or best offer) Not the original dedicated cabinet. Condition: - Cabinet needs some love due to age. - Monitor powers on, image is good, but likely needs new caps - Lights and sound both work. - Controls function, but the guns need recalibration. - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only.

ads.author: Byron Gaddis
ads.title: California Speed Video Driving Arcade Game
ads.description: Up for your consideration is a California Speed Arcade driving game. It plays as is but would definitely benefit from a LCD monitor. I’ve had this machine for about 8 years and it has just started buzzing when you turn it on. I don’t know anything about these but I did talk to an arcade dealer and he said that it’s likely inference or the sound board. This machine does have the ability to be paired with another machine.

ads.author: Jon Sutcliffe
ads.title: Centuri Gyruss Arcade Game
ads.description: This is an original working 1983 Centuri Gyruss arcade game with a 19" CRT. 100% working - No issues - All works as it should This was in an arcade for some of its 43 year history. It's not perfect but pretty nice and very clean. Look at video and pictures, ask for more. If you're local, come to look it over and play a few games! Owner's manual and schematics are in backdoor pocket. Keys and locks for coin door and backdoor. Set to free play but can be configured to accept quarters or tokens. (Quarter coin mechs are included) All Original: - Gryuss PCBs and wiring harnesses - G07-CBO 19"CRT and chassis - Marquee and Bezel - Side art - Joystick New: - Control Panel Overlay art - Buttons - Message me to discuss game details, ask for more pictures, videos. - Prefer local pickup so you can see it and play it. I will help load. - Will ship if you make all shipper arrangements - Can deliver ~locally to your door for a fee. No stairs or other adventures. Make me an offer! Cash or PayPal. No Checks. I will consider trade for a pinball.

Never seen one of these before so just going by what I see Pick up Thomas cove Dr groveland FL. We will assist in shipping. You can send your own shipping company in or we work with Woody's haul and ace in shipping machines. Cabinet is in great shape just missing parts sold as is. If post is up it's available

ads.title: Carnival Arcade Game
ads.description: I have Carnival arcade game made by Gremlin/Sega in 1980 . Game plays great. I will not answer questions in the comments section. PM me if you interested. Asking $900.00 Firm. Located in Jacksonville, Florida. Shipping anywhere in the country will cost between $500.00-$750.00 through Beltman Logistics / STI.

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.
